content.json:
## RAG-over-APIM — Observability
Single pane over the central Log Analytics workspace: read-path health, token/cost, RAG-stage latency, backend & ingestion failures, and a change feed to correlate spikes with deploys.

_KQL assumes OTel span attributes land under the `Properties` column of `App*` tables — verify column/role mapping against live telemetry on first deploy and tweak if needed._

content.title: Chat requests & failures over time
content.query:
AppRequests
| where Name has "/chat"
| summarize Requests = count(), Failures = countif(Success == false) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

content.title: Token usage by model (cost proxy)
content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == "llm-call"
| extend model = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"]),
         inTok = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
         outTok = toint(Properties["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| summarize Tokens = sum(inTok + outTok) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), model
| order by TimeGenerated asc

content.title: RAG stage latency (retrieve vs llm-call)
content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name in ("retrieve", "llm-call")
| summarize p50 = percentile(DurationMs, 50), p95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95) by Name

content.title: Gateway responses by code (surfaces 429 throttling)
content.query:
AppRequests
| where Name has "chat" or Name has "embeddings"
| summarize Count = count() by ResultCode, AppRoleName
| order by Count desc

content.title: Failed read-path calls (pivot via OperationId → transaction)
content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name in ("llm-call", "retrieve") and Success == false
| project TimeGenerated, Name, ResultCode, DurationMs, OperationId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100

content.json:
### Ingestion health
_Note: a crash before the first `ingest-doc` span won't appear here — the change feed's `jobs/start` entry confirms the run was at least attempted._

content.title: Documents ingested vs failed
content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == "ingest-doc"
| summarize Ingested = countif(Success == true), Failed = countif(Success == false) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

content.title: Failed documents by id
content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == "ingest-doc" and Success == false
| extend docId = tostring(Properties["doc.id"])
| project TimeGenerated, docId, ResultCode, OperationId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100

content.json: ### Change feed — correlate spikes with deploys/restarts

content.title: Control-plane changes (deploys, revision writes, job starts)
content.query:
AzureActivity
| where CategoryValue == "Administrative"
| where OperationNameValue has_any ("deployments/write", "containerApps/write", "jobs/start/action", "restart")
| where ActivityStatusValue in ("Success", "Succeeded", "Accepted", "Started")
| project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, ActivityStatusValue, Caller, ResourceGroup, _ResourceId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
